description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a pastel blue and pink gradient canvas upper, featuring a cream-colored rubber toe cap and sole. The shoe has pink laces threaded through metallic eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star patch in cream and black, adding a classic branding detail. The sole and toe cap are made of durable rubber, while the upper appears to be made of canvas or a similar textile. The shoe's interior is hollow, designed to accommodate a human foot, and the overall construction suggests comfort and flexibility for urban walking. The finish is smooth with a slight matte sheen, and the shoe appears to be in new condition with no visible signs of wear.
description: A pastel blue and pink high-top sneaker with a cream rubber toe cap, sole, and pink laces, featuring a Converse All Star patch. The shoe is clean, smooth, and in new condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded cream toe cap, pink laces, and the symmetrical shape of the high-top sneaker.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the pastel gradient upper, pink laces, and the clean cream sole, with no visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the vertical seam and the cream heel of the shoe, with the pastel gradient wrapping around.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the Converse All Star patch, pastel gradient upper, and the full length of the cream sole.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the inner side, cream background with black text and star.
